creator: jhelfman@experts-exchange.com
text:
update JasperReports to 4.0.0 (lastest)
built clean in tinderbox
patches added:
 * use local port installed themes from dist. source code (otherwise themes/css breaks and web interface is not functional)
 * changes mysql connnection string to avoid sql conversion on empty date (Cannot convert value '0000-00-00 00:00:00')
 * add in mysql sql default security from 3.5.0 source for administrative user login (works in 4.0.0, as well)

PostgreSQL support will need to follow at a later date, as I need to get some sql to create a user. Once this happens, I can 
add in support for PostgreSQL.
